description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a predominantly green and white cover. The front cover features a large, realistic image of a green human eye set within a circular frame, giving the book a modern and slightly technological appearance. The book's edges are straight and the spine is sturdy, suggesting it is a reference or academic volume. The back cover is mostly plain with a gradient of green shades and a barcode on the left side. The pages are tightly bound and the book appears to be in good condition, with minimal wear visible on the cover. The overall size and weight indicate it is a substantial volume, likely intended for study or professional use.
description: A thick hardcover book with a green and white cover, featuring a large eye illustration on the front. The book is sturdy, with a plain green back and tightly bound pages.
description_view_0: The book is viewed from the side, showing the white page block and the thickness of the volume.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, displaying a green and white design with a prominent eye illustration.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the book's spine and the thickness of the cover, with some text partially visible.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, featuring a gradient green design and a barcode on the left.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, realistic green human eye set within a circular frame, rendered in a photographic or hyper-realistic style. The background is a gradient of green and white, with no additional decorative elements or artwork.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is mostly white with some green, featuring vertically oriented text in a simple, sans-serif font. There are no decorative patterns or illustrations visible.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small blue and white rectangular logo is visible on the lower right corner of the front cover.
